nouns.summary: The text states that Ζοροβαβὲλ “ἐγέννησεν” (begat) Ἀβιούδ.
The text presents Ἀβιούδ as the person begotten by Ζοροβαβὲλ and then having begotten Ἐλιακίμ.
The text shows Ἐλιακίμ being begotten by Ἀβιούδ and then itself begatting Ἀζώρ.
The text describes Ἀζώρ as the person begotten by Ἐλιακίμ.
